chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 974 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For orders on CMA No.3531/2022 (Ex./A) 3. For orders on CMA No.3532/2022 (S/A) 4. For hearing of main case 03-08-2022 Mr. Abdul Wahab G. Shaikh, Advocate, has filed power on behalf of the petitioner, which is taken on record. Counsel for the petitioner does not press the present petition. The same is dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
